description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On Friday, April 24, I attended the opening ceremony marking the completion of the reconstruction of the Higashi-Agano Police Box (東吾野駐在所).

The Higashi-Agano Police Box is the community's closest point of contact and serves as a vital hub for keeping our residents safe and secure. With this newly rebuilt facility as the center, I look forward to the police deepening their partnership with local residents, becoming even more integrated into our community, and serving as a reassuring presence and reliable support for the lives of everyone who calls this place home.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202604/13484.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Opening Ceremony for Higashi-Agano Police Box
